title: Xtra Fluffy Norwegian Oatmeal Grill
description: A quick and earthy Norwegian dish featuring oatmeal, grilled to perfection, and suitable for a Jain-friendly diet. This recipe combines the simplicity of oatmeal with the savory flavor of grilled vegetables.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil.
Add the oats, salt, and reduce heat to low, cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
While the oats are cooking, preheat a yakimono-grill or a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Brush the carrots, zucchini, onion, and mushrooms with olive oil and season with salt.
Grill the vegetables for 3-4 minutes per side, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
Fluff the cooked oats with a fork and divide among plates.
Top the oats with the grilled vegetables and serve immediately.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
